title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - LIC - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, LIC in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About LIC:
LIC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC!
